name: Epic Voice
description: Sweeping third-person with elevated register, mythic overtones, and grand-scale narration.
prompt_fragments: Write in third-person past tense with an elevated, omniscient narrative voice.
Use longer, flowing sentences for landscape and history. Short declarative sentences for pivotal moments.
Name places, peoples, and artifacts as though they carry centuries of weight.
Battle and conflict scenes should feel consequential — describe formations, weather, and the emotional cost.
Allow the narrator to occasionally pull back to a bird's-eye view of events.

lexicon_preferences.notes: Tolkien-adjacent register. Avoid modern colloquialisms. Formal but not impenetrable.

validation_heuristics: Flag modern slang or anachronistic phrasing.
Flag scenes that lack at least one sensory detail of landscape or weather.
